messages.text: I was charged twice this month for my subscription.
I can see the duplicate charge on your account. I'll issue a refund now.
Thank you, how long will that take?
3 to 5 business days to appear on your statement.
My invoice shows the wrong amount.
Can you share the invoice number?
Found it — there was a proration error. I've corrected it.
The app keeps crashing when I try to open it.
What device and OS version are you using?
iPhone 14, iOS 17.
There's a known issue fixed in v2.3. Try reinstalling the app.
I can't log in, it says my account is locked.
I've unlocked your account. Please reset your password before logging in.
Got it, thank you.
I want to cancel my subscription.
Can I ask why you're cancelling?
It's too expensive for me right now.
Understood. I've cancelled your subscription effective end of billing cycle.
How do I add team members to my account?
Go to Settings, then Team, and click Invite. Enter their email addresses there.
Perfect, found it thanks.
Does your product support single sign-on?
Yes, we support SAML 2.0 SSO on the Enterprise plan.
What about SCIM provisioning?
Also available on Enterprise.
I cancelled but still got charged this month.
The cancellation came in after the billing date. I'll refund this charge for you.
Okay, thank you.
too short
I forgot my password and the reset email never arrived.
Let me resend the reset email. Can you check your spam folder as well?
Found it in spam, working now.
Great! You may want to whitelist our domain to avoid that in future.
The app is freezing on my Android phone whenever I open a report.
Which Android version are you on?
Android 14 on a Pixel 7.
This is a known bug in v3.1. Please update to v3.2 from the Play Store and it should be resolved.
I'd like to upgrade from the Pro plan to Enterprise.
Happy to help. Enterprise starts at $500/month. Would you like to talk to our sales team?
Yes please, can you set that up?
I've sent a meeting invite from our sales team to your email.
I want to downgrade my plan to Basic.
The downgrade will take effect at your next billing cycle. You'll lose access to advanced reporting. Shall I proceed?
Yes, go ahead.
Done. Your plan will switch to Basic on the 15th.
Can I export all my data? I need it for compliance.
Yes. Go to Settings > Data > Export All. You'll get a CSV download link via email.
How long does it take to generate?
Usually under 10 minutes for most accounts.
Under GDPR I'm requesting deletion of all my personal data.
Understood. I'll flag this as a formal GDPR erasure request. We'll process it within 30 days and confirm by email.
Thank you.
Does your platform integrate with Slack?
Yes, we have a native Slack integration. You can enable it under Settings > Integrations > Slack.
Can it post alerts to a specific channel?
Yes, you can choose any channel during setup and configure which alert types to send.
I need to update the billing address on my account.
You can update it under Billing > Payment Details > Edit Address.
I don't see that option.
You may need Admin rights. I can update it for you — what's the new address?
My account got locked again after I just reset the password.
It looks like there were multiple failed login attempts from an unfamiliar IP. I've unlocked it and flagged the activity.
Should I be worried?
I'd recommend enabling two-factor authentication under Security Settings as a precaution.
How do I generate a new API key?
Go to Settings > API > Create New Key. Give it a name and select the required scopes.
Can I limit it to read-only access?
Yes, just select only the read scopes when creating the key.
The dashboard is loading really slowly for me today.
We had a brief infrastructure issue earlier this morning that's now resolved. Are you still seeing slowness?
No, it seems fine now.
Good to hear. We've posted an incident summary on our status page if you need it.
I was charged for a full month but I only signed up two weeks ago.
You're right, you should have been prorated. I'll apply a credit for the unused days to your account.
Will it show up on my next invoice?
Yes, it will appear as a credit on your next billing statement.
I used a promo code but still got charged full price.
Let me look into that. Can you share the promo code you used?
SAVE20
The code was applied but only covers the first month. I can issue a partial refund for this billing period if that helps.
Yes please, that would be great.
My payment failed and now my account is suspended.
It looks like your card was declined. Do you have an updated card you'd like to use?
Yes, let me give you the new card details.
I've updated your payment method and restored your account access.
Can I get a receipt for my last payment?
Of course. I'll send a copy to the email address on your account right now.
Thanks.
Done — you should receive it within a few minutes.
I see a price increase on my latest invoice but I was never notified.
I'm sorry about that. A notice was sent 30 days ago but it may have gone to spam. I'll apply a one-time credit for the difference.
Okay, that's fair. Thank you.
I accidentally bought the wrong plan. Can I get a refund?
Of course. Which plan did you intend to purchase?
I wanted Basic, not Pro.
I've refunded the Pro charge and switched your account to the Basic plan.
My authenticator app codes aren't working since I got a new phone.
I can help you re-enroll two-factor authentication. First, I'll send a verification code to your email.
Got the code.
Great. Now go to Security Settings and scan the new QR code with your authenticator app.
I see a login from Germany in my activity log but I'm in the US.
That does look suspicious. I'll log out all active sessions and lock the account while you investigate.
Please do that.
Done. I've flagged it for our security team. Reset your password before logging back in.
Our company changed email domains and now I can't log in.
I can update your login email. What is your new company email address?
It's jsmith@newdomain.com
Updated. You can now log in with your new email address.
A team member left the company and I need to revoke their access.
Go to Settings > Team and click Remove next to their name. That will revoke their access immediately.
Should I also rotate our API keys?
Yes, if they had access to API keys, I recommend rotating those under Settings > API.
My CSV export keeps failing with a 500 error.
Can you tell me the date range and filters you're using?
Last 90 days, all users.
This looks like a backend issue. I've filed a bug report and will email you when it's resolved. As a workaround, try exporting in 30-day chunks.
I'm not getting any email notifications anymore.
Let me check your notification settings. It looks like your email alerts were toggled off — possibly after a recent settings update.
Can you turn them back on?
Done. You should start receiving email notifications again immediately.
The charts on my dashboard are showing the wrong dates. Everything is off by a day.
That's likely a timezone mismatch. What timezone are you in?
UTC-5, Eastern.
Set your account timezone to America/New_York under Profile Settings. That should fix the date offset.
I can't upload a file — it says the file is too large.
The web uploader has a 10MB limit. How large is your file?
It's about 80MB.
For files over 10MB, you'll need to use our API upload endpoint. I can send you the documentation for that.
The mobile app isn't showing the data I just updated on the website.
This is usually a caching issue on the mobile app. Try pulling down to force a refresh.
That didn't work.
In that case, log out of the app and back in — that clears the local cache and should sync everything.
Can I pause my subscription instead of cancelling?
Yes, you can pause for up to 3 months. Your data will be preserved and billing stops during the pause.
Great, please pause it for 2 months.
Done. Your subscription is paused and will resume automatically in 2 months.
I want to switch from monthly to annual billing.
Annual billing saves you 20% — you'd pay $960 instead of $1200 per year.
That sounds good, please switch me over.
Switched. Your annual plan starts today and we've prorated the remaining monthly days.
My free trial ended but I haven't had time to fully evaluate the product.
I can extend your trial by 7 days at no charge. Would that work for you?
That would be perfect, thank you.
Done — your trial is now extended through next week.
If I cancel, what happens to my data?
Your data is retained for 30 days after cancellation. You can export it any time during that window.
And after 30 days?
It is permanently deleted from our systems after the 30-day retention period.
We need a data processing agreement for our enterprise contract.
I'll send our standard DPA to the email on your account. Please review and sign it.
Can we add custom clauses?
Yes, custom DPA terms are available for Enterprise accounts. I'll loop in our legal team.
Where is our data physically stored? We need to confirm it's in the EU for GDPR.
All data for EU customers is stored in our Frankfurt data center, which is GDPR-compliant.
Is there any data that goes outside the EU?
No, we keep all EU customer data within EU data centers. I can provide a written confirmation if needed.
I need an audit log of all user actions on our account for a compliance review.
You can download the full audit log from Settings > Security > Audit Log. You can filter by date range and user.
How far back does it go?
The audit log retains 12 months of activity.
Is your platform SOC 2 certified?
Yes, we hold SOC 2 Type II certification. I can share the report under NDA if required.
Yes please, we'll need it for our vendor review.
I'll send you the NDA and report link by email shortly.
How do I connect Salesforce to sync our contacts?
Go to Settings > Integrations > Salesforce and click Connect. You'll need your Salesforce admin credentials.
Does it sync both ways?
Yes, it supports bidirectional sync. You can configure which fields are synced from the integration settings.
I want to receive real-time events via webhook. How do I set that up?
Go to Settings > Integrations > Webhooks and add your endpoint URL. You can subscribe to specific event types.
What does the payload look like?
Each payload is a JSON object with an event type, timestamp, and data object. I can send you our webhook documentation.
Does your platform integrate with Zapier?
Yes, we have a native Zapier integration with over 20 triggers and actions.
Can I trigger a Zap when a new user signs up?
Yes, 'New User Created' is one of our available Zapier triggers.
Can I embed a dashboard in our internal website?
Yes. Go to the dashboard, click Share, and select Embed. You'll get an iframe code to paste into your site.
Can I restrict it so only logged-in users can see it?
Yes, you can enable authentication on the embed so it only renders for authenticated sessions.
What are the API rate limits?
The default limit is 1000 requests per minute per API key.
What happens if we hit the limit?
You'll receive a 429 response. We recommend implementing exponential backoff and retry logic in your integration.
Our Jira integration stopped pulling in new tickets after we updated Jira.
This usually happens when the Jira OAuth token expires after an update. Can you go to Settings > Integrations > Jira?
I see it's showing a red disconnected status.
Click Reconnect and re-authorize with your Jira admin account. That should restore the sync.
